# The Document Index

> The living index of document-AI tooling — OCR, PDF extraction, document parsing, layout
> & structure, table extraction and vision-language understanding — ranked daily by GitHub momentum.

Updated: 2026-07-08T12:07:59.562533+00:00
Tools indexed: 202

## Top document-AI tools by momentum

- [baidu/Unlimited-OCR](https://github.com/baidu/Unlimited-OCR) — momentum 88, ⭐13678 — OCR Engines — Unlimited OCR Works: Welcome the Era of One-shot Long-horizon Parsing.
